chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4255 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For hearing of main case 13.11.2025 Mr. Saeed Ahmed, advocates for the petitioner Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG --------- The main grievance of the learned counsel for the petitioner is that departmental appeal / representation for granting promotion from Assistant Professor (Gynae & OBS) (BPS-18) to the post of Associate Professor (Gynae & OBS) (BPS-19) in Khairpur Medical College, Khairpur Mirs, which the petitioner filed before the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh dated 09.09.2023, has still not been responded to. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he would be satisfied if this Court directs the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh, to decide the aforesaid departmental appeal/representation of the petitioner within three months from the date of this order, through a speaking order, after providing the petitioner an opportunity of personal hearing. Learned AAG has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh alongwith a departmental appeal / representation, which is at Page 45 to 57 of the file, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms. HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
